title: Robiquetia fuerstenbergiana
taxonomy: Robiquetia fuerstenbergiana is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Malaxideae. Within the genus Robiquetia, it is recognized as a distinct species due to its unique characteristics. Robiquetia fuerstenbergiana is native to the island of Borneo and is considered an endemic species.
